subject: RE:
body:
Vivien Gerena, the project manager at ACOE was out all last week. I am
calling her shortly to arrange to meet her as soon as possible tomorrow or
Wednesday. At the same time I am trying to coordinate this visit with a site
review of one of the two pre-casting operations I know of in PR, as you
requested.  I will go to ACOE no matter what happens on the pre-casting
front. 

 

From: J. Epstein [mailto:jeeproject@yahoo.com] 
Sent: Monday, January 07, 2008 8:56 AM
To: John Amerling
Subject: Re:

 

did you go to san juan ?

----- Original Message ----
From: John Amerling <john_amerling@earthlink.net>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Monday, January 7, 2008 7:46:13 AM
Subject: RE:

Dan has a couple of names as a starter. I will, however, organize and give
you a complete response asap. I did call back on Saturday and I am ready to
speak with you at your convenience. 

 

From: J. Epstein [mailto:jeeproject@yahoo.com] 
Sent: Sunday, January 06, 2008 6:35 PM
To: John Amerling
Cc: DKIESQ@aol.com; Emad Hanna
Subject: Re:

 

I want four local pool contractors, and the photos of their work by friday  

----- Original Message ----
From: John Amerling <john_amerling@earthlink.net>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Friday, January 4, 2008 10:05:34 AM
Subject: 

Would you let me know when we could have a moment for a follow up
conversation? Thanks. 

 

Lafayette Contractors, LLC

6100 Red Hook Quarters, Suite A2-7

St. Thomas, VI 00802

340 779-8054 (O)

340 779-8055 (FAX)

340 690-7194 (Cell)
